packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【自在 AI 每一刻】
新增在小布建议上，显示商圈卡和医院卡，可以展示商场和医院名称，并提供多个服务，方便使用
新增在小布建议上，支持对默认天气服务进行自定义编辑，可以设置为天气时钟、日历、运动计步等多个服务
优化小布建议的一键清理卡，增加多种精细化场景展示，如：相似照片清理、缓存垃圾清理等，分类更详细

【处处有细节，细节有惊喜】
新增出圈拼图功能，打破边框束缚，让照片主体“跳”出边框，给你的照片带来更多层次和趣味性
新增支持在车载屏幕上使用百度地图新版本的巡航功能，带来沉浸式车道级巡航、超视距安全预警、全车道指引、至真引擎以及车位级导航的智能体验
新增部分灵感主题在编辑时支持拖拽调整时钟大小，更方便
新增支持在桌面添加天气信息+紫外线组合卡片，方便了解天气和紫外线强度
新增支持在桌面添加天气信息+日出日落组合卡片，方便了解天气和日出日落时间
新增支持在桌面添加日出日落卡片，方便了解日出日落时间
新增停车助手支持展示支付宝停车数据，并在流体云上显示，停车取车更方便
新增在流体云上支持显示高德地图驾车导航功能，让驾车操作更方便
新增支持拖拽文本、图片、文档等内容至内容传送门指定服务，可实现内容跨应用转移，更方便更快捷
新增在相册中裁剪旋转图片时，支持自动校正，一键自动水平校正、人像校正和建筑校正，调整构图更轻松
新增支持将本地视频设为电话铃声，让你的铃声更具个性化
新增天气首页支持语音播报功能，可语音播报当天天气，了解天气更简单
优化锁屏中环影指纹样式的显示效果，融入光感设计，视觉更美观
优化多日天气卡片，支持显示降雨气象预警信息
优化小时天气卡片，支持显示降雨气象预警信息
提升定位稳定性

【网络通信】
新增网络检测功能，可对当前网络进行测速，查看网络状态，如：网络延迟、上传/下载速度等
提升网络兼容性和稳定性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Effortless AI at every moment】
Breeno Suggestions now supports the display of business district widgets and hospital widgets, showing the names of shopping malls and hospitals while providing multiple services.
You can now customize the default weather services in Breeno Suggestions by setting them as a weather clock, calendar, step counter, or other services.
The Clean up widget in Breeno Suggestions now supports the display of more scenarios, such as similar photo and cache clearing.

【Delight in details】
Adds a "Popout" option to the "Collage" feature that allows the photo subject to "pop" out of the border, adding more fun to photo editing.
You can now use the cruise feature from the new version of Baidu Maps on your car display, which offers an immersive, lane-level cruise experience, long-distance safety warnings, full-lane guidance, the Real Engine, and parking space-level navigation.
When editing certain Flux themes, you can now resize the clock.
You can now add a combined weather information and UV widget to the Home screen for easy access to weather information and UV intensity.
You can now add a combined weather information and sunrise and sunset widget to the Home screen for easy access to weather information and sunrise and sunset times.
You can now add a sunrise and sunset widget to the Home screen for easy access to sunrise and sunset times.
Parking Assistant now supports the display of parking data from Alipay on Live Alerts, making it easier to find and remember parking spots for your car.
Live Alerts now supports the display of driving navigation from Amap, making driving more convenient.
You can now drag text, images, documents, and other content to designated services in Content Portal, making it easier and faster to transfer content across apps.
You can now use automatic straightening when cropping and rotating portrait and architectural images in Photos.
You can now set videos on your device as ringtones.
The Weather app's homepage now supports voice announcements of the daily weather.
Improves the "Ring" fingerprint animation on the Lock screen by incorporating a glowing effect for a more aesthetically pleasing appearance.
The Daily weather widget now supports the display of rainy weather warning information.
The Hourly weather widget now supports the display of rainy weather warning information.
Improves location stability.

【Network connections】
You can now test your network speed and check network status details, such as latency and upload/download speeds.
Improves network compatibility and stability.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc: 不发布OTA 只发产线生产
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish: 不发布OTA 只发产线生产
